subcodes.first_line: O valiant one of the field! Praise be to God that thou hast witnessed with thine outward eye how the aid and grace of the True One encompasseth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فارس میدان الحمد لله بچشم ظاهر مشاهده نمودی که عون و عنایت حق ترا بر کل
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
